---
name: Bug report
about: Something parsed wrong, or the app misbehaved
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What did you type?**
The exact quick-add text (this is the most useful thing for parsing bugs):

```
e.g. 明天下午3点 开会 30min
```

**What did you expect?**
e.g. a Calendar event tomorrow 15:00–15:30 titled "开会".

**What actually happened?**

**Environment**
- macOS version:
- QuickAdd version (menu bar ▸ Settings ▸ About):
- Language of the input (中文 / 日本語 / English / mixed):
